The median factor is 1.989.

Converting 34.9:
34.9 * 1.989:
34.9 * 0.009 = 0.3141
34.9 * 0.080 = 2.7920
34.9 * 0.900 = 31.4100
34.9 * 1.000 = 34.9000
0.3141 + 2.7920 = 3.1061
3.1061 + 31.4100 = 34.5161
34.5161 + 34.9000 = 69.4161
= 69.416

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{69.416}
